post.message: LLM judge reported the PR title claims a fix that the changed non-test code does not plausibly exercise. Deterministic checks did not fire, but the judge's reading of intent vs. diff disagrees.
post.judgeRationale: The PR title claims to "Add cache checks for openapi router fixtures," but the only non-test code change is in `packages/openapi/src/generate.ts` which simplifies JSDoc filtering logic unrelated to caching, while all the actual caching implementation is in test scripts and configuration files.
